name: school-equipment-lending
description: FSAD-style full stack: React + Node microservices + MongoDB + API gateway

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix BE/gateway && npm install --prefix BE/services/auth-service && npm install --prefix BE/services/equipment-service && npm install --prefix BE/services/booking-service && npm install --prefix FE/frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n auth,equip,book,gw,fe -c blue,green,magenta,yellow,cyan "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:equipment" "npm run dev:booking" "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:frontend"
